Factions

𝕳ᥲrᑲ᥆r 𝕮і𝗍ᥡ 𝕭᥆ᥡs (HCB): An unorganized street gang, known for their ruthless tactics and control over illegal gambling and extortion in the southside of Bayview Harbor. They often operate out of abandoned warehouses and dilapidated docks along the waterfront.
